rule angler_flash

	strings:

		$string1 = "r$g@ 0'[A"
		$string2 = ";R-1qTP"
		$string3 = "xwBtR4"
		$string4 = "YbVjxp"
		$string5 = "ddgXkF"
		$string6 = ")n'URF"
		$string7 = "vAzq@W"
		$string8 = "rOkX$6m<"
		$string9 = "@@DB}q "
		$string10 = "TiKV'iV"
		$string11 = "538x;B"
		$string12 = "9pEM{d"
		$string13 = ".SIy/O"
		$string14 = "ER<Gu,"

	condition:

}
